task_description: Implement Twilio SMS/Messaging integration for Phase 42 FEAT-003: SMS provider, message store, webhook handler, and message agent with full test coverage

verification.summary: typecheck clean, all 87 tests pass (26 new across 4 test files). Tests exercise real code paths: message store CRUD/search, webhook signature validation/rejection, SMS send in both modes, agent intent dispatch with permission checks and contact resolution.
